data.title: Edgewater Wireless extends term of debentures issued on Sept 1, 2022 from maturity date of Sept 1, 2025. TSX-V acceptance sought.
data.description: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc. is in the process of seeking approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for an extension of the maturity date of unsecured convertible debentures. These debentures were issued as part of a private placement finalized on September 1, 2022. Originally set to mature on September 1, 2025, the company is now requesting an extension beyond the original three-year period. Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc. is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol YFI and also trades on the OTC market under the symbol KPIFF.

data.title: Polestar to release H1 2025 unaudited financial results on 3 September 2025, with a conference call at 14:00 CET.
data.description: Polestar (Nasdaq: PSNY), a Swedish electric performance car brand, is set to release its unaudited financial results for H1 2025 on September 3, 2025, ahead of market opening. A conference call will be hosted by management at 14:00 Central European Time (08:00 US Eastern Time) on the same day, which can be accessed through the Polestar Investor Relations website. Polestar is known for its commitment to uncompromised design and innovation as it strives to drive change in the electric vehicle sector.

data.title: Eric Trump praises rising influence of cryptocurrency in Hong Kong, predicts Bitcoin to surpass $1 million one day.
data.description: The son of the former president and a key figure in managing the Trump family's digital currency ventures made a bold prediction, stating that Bitcoin is expected to surpass the $1 million mark in the future.

data.title: Embrace simple thinking to excel: Build skills from awareness. Article highlights importance of simplicity in achieving mastery.
data.description: Embracing awareness and straightforward thinking in your professional endeavors is crucial. By beginning with simplicity, you pave the way for acquiring additional skills. This approach not only fosters mastery but also allows for continuous growth in your field.
